SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class NotificationHelper

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.NotificationHelper
public class NotificationHelper extends Object
Utility class for sending in-app notifications to entrants. Notifications are stored in Firestore at users/{deviceId}/notifications. Respects the entrant's notificationsEnabled flag (US 01.04.03). Sends win notifications (US 01.04.01), loss notifications (US 01.04.02), private event invite notifications (US 01.05.06), co-organizer assignment, cancelled-entrant rejoin, and waiting-list encouragement updates.

    static final String
    TYPE_PRIVATE_INVITE

    TYPE_WAITING_LIST_UPDATE
    Organizer sent a kind update to entrants still pending on the waiting list (not a lottery win).

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    NotificationMAINstorageForAdmin(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String title, String message, String eventId, String receiverID)
    Stores a copy of every notification in a top-level collection for admin log review (US 03.08.01).
    static void
    sendCancelledEntrantRejoinNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, android.content.Context context, String deviceId, String eventId)
    Notifies a cancelled or declined entrant that they may rejoin the event (organizer action).
    static void
    sendCoOrganizerAssignedNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId, String title, String message)
    Notifies a user they were selected as co-organizer for an event.
    static void
    sendLotteryLossNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
    Sends the standard lottery-loss notification (US 01.04.02).
    static void
    sendLotteryWinNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
    Sends the standard lottery-win notification (US 01.04.01).
    static void
    sendNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String type, String title, String message, String eventId)
    Sends a notification to a specific entrant, but only if they have notifications enabled (US 01.04.03).
    static void
    sendPrivateInviteNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
    Sends a private event waiting list invitation notification (US 01.05.06).
    static void
    sendWaitingListUpdateNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, android.content.Context context, String deviceId, String eventId)
    Notifies pending waiting-list entrants with an encouraging update (organizer action).

      public NotificationHelper()

  • Method Details

    • sendLotteryWinNotification

      public static void sendLotteryWinNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
      Sends the standard lottery-win notification (US 01.04.01).

    • sendLotteryLossNotification

      public static void sendLotteryLossNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
      Sends the standard lottery-loss notification (US 01.04.02).

    • sendPrivateInviteNotification

      public static void sendPrivateInviteNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId)
      Sends a private event waiting list invitation notification (US 01.05.06). Respects notification opt-out (US 01.04.03).
      Parameters:
      db - Firestore instance
      deviceId - Target entrant's device ID
      eventId - The private event's ID

    • sendCoOrganizerAssignedNotification

      public static void sendCoOrganizerAssignedNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String eventId, String title, String message)
      Notifies a user they were selected as co-organizer for an event. Respects notification opt-out (US 01.04.03).

    • sendCancelledEntrantRejoinNotification

      public static void sendCancelledEntrantRejoinNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, android.content.Context context, String deviceId, String eventId)
      Notifies a cancelled or declined entrant that they may rejoin the event (organizer action). Title and body come from string resources notification_cancelled_rejoin_title and notification_cancelled_rejoin_message. Respects notification opt-out.

    • sendWaitingListUpdateNotification

      public static void sendWaitingListUpdateNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, android.content.Context context, String deviceId, String eventId)
      Notifies pending waiting-list entrants with an encouraging update (organizer action). Does not use the lottery-win copy — see TYPE_WAITING_LIST_UPDATE.

    • sendNotification

      public static void sendNotification(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String deviceId, String type, String title, String message, String eventId)
      Sends a notification to a specific entrant, but only if they have notifications enabled (US 01.04.03).
      Parameters:
      db - Firestore instance
      deviceId - Target entrant's device ID
      type - Notification type
      title - Notification title
      message - Notification message body
      eventId - Related event ID

    • NotificationMAINstorageForAdmin

      public static void NotificationMAINstorageForAdmin(com.google.firebase.firestore.FirebaseFirestore db, String title, String message, String eventId, String receiverID)
      Stores a copy of every notification in a top-level collection for admin log review (US 03.08.01).
